baseCases.condition: config has no nested sub-configs (leaf node)
baseCases.result: validate primitive fields directly; return list of field-level errors

recurrence.closedForm: O(n) where n = total number of config nodes
recurrence.spaceComplexity: O(d) where d = maximum nesting depth

subproblems.description: validate each sub-config block using the same validation rules
subproblems.size: number of nodes in the sub-config subtree
